raw_consumer_statement: I had a credit card with Citibank for 9 + years. On XX/XX/XXXX XXXXXXXX  I was trying to buy a plane ticket by phone with XXXX. The person who answered said " reservation can I help you '' from there I continued with the process and then realized that it's not the right company at the last minute when the man on the other line said " I am going to send your info to reservation desk. I answered : what I thought I was talking with an agent of XXXX, he said that we do reservation for XXXX, this is a flight reservation service and handed up. I called XXXX immediately and was told that they didn't have no record of the reservation I just made and I had to re-book and pay again. I called Citibank credit department and was asked to wait for the transaction to be posted and then dispute it / file a claim what I did on XX/XX/XXXX. They spent days before trying to do something, they credited my account and debited it for the same transaction more than three times. the process last more then 6 months. At the end the account was closed with only this transaction / amount and now they are still charging interest on it, even after their fraud department said that I wasn't responsible for the transaction.
